sort
cases.text:
module {
  func.func public @main(%0: tensor<5xf32>) -> (tensor<5xf32>) {
    %1 = "stablehlo.sort"(%0) <{dimension = 0 : i64, is_stable = true}> ({
    ^bb0(%2: tensor<f32>, %3: tensor<f32>):
      %4 = stablehlo.constant dense<0.000000e+00> : tensor<f32>
      %5 = stablehlo.compare EQ, %2, %4, FLOAT : (tensor<f32>, tensor<f32>) -> tensor<i1>
      %6 = stablehlo.constant dense<0.000000e+00> : tensor<f32>
      %7 = stablehlo.select %5, %6, %2 : tensor<i1>, tensor<f32>
      %8 = stablehlo.compare NE, %2, %2, FLOAT : (tensor<f32>, tensor<f32>) -> tensor<i1>
      %9 = stablehlo.constant dense<0x7FC00000> : tensor<f32>
      %10 = stablehlo.select %8, %9, %7 : tensor<i1>, tensor<f32>
      %11 = stablehlo.constant dense<0.000000e+00> : tensor<f32>
      %12 = stablehlo.compare EQ, %3, %11, FLOAT : (tensor<f32>, tensor<f32>) -> tensor<i1>
      %13 = stablehlo.constant dense<0.000000e+00> : tensor<f32>
      %14 = stablehlo.select %12, %13, %3 : tensor<i1>, tensor<f32>
      %15 = stablehlo.compare NE, %3, %3, FLOAT : (tensor<f32>, tensor<f32>) -> tensor<i1>
      %16 = stablehlo.constant dense<0x7FC00000> : tensor<f32>
      %17 = stablehlo.select %15, %16, %14 : tensor<i1>, tensor<f32>
      %18 = stablehlo.compare LT, %10, %17, TOTALORDER : (tensor<f32>, tensor<f32>) -> tensor<i1>
      stablehlo.return %18 : tensor<i1>
    }) : (tensor<5xf32>) -> tensor<5xf32>
    return %1 : tensor<5xf32>
  }
}
